name: Bunny Farm
author: Poki
description: Bunny Farm is a farming simulation game where you grow your business as an adorable bunny! Your animal friends are hungry, and it’s up to you to grow and harvest the food they need. Start with simple crops like carrots and wheat—plant, water, and harvest them to complete orders and earn money. Unlock new tools to process crops into delicious food, discover new recipes, and even hire workers to help! Can you build the best farm in town? How to play Bunny Farm? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Bunny Farm? Bunny Farm is created by Rastislav Kanis. Play their other games on Poki: Bunny Market ! How can I play Bunny Farm for free? You can play Bunny Farm for free on Poki. Can I play Bunny Farm on mobile devices and desktop? Bunny Farm can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
